title: Buck Institute Morphology H & E staining protocol

before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"irlg","text":"Slides can be placed in 60 C oven prior to deparaffinization. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"aq2ec","text":"Xylene (C8H10)CAS No. 1330-20-7 is a colorless, flammable liquid with a sweet odor. Exposure to xylene can irritate the eyes, nose, skin, and throat. Xylene can also cause headaches, dizziness, confusion, loss of muscle coordination, and in high doses, death. Workers may be harmed from exposure to xylene.","type":"align-left","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"sub","offset":9,"length":1},{"style":"sub","offset":11,"length":2}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"fkvjo","text":"from https://www.cdc.gov/niosh/topics/xylene/","type":"align-left","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":5,"length":40}],"data":{}},{"key":"58kak","text":"Permount Mounting Media is toluene-based synthetic resin mounting medium. materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"9oc0f","text":"1. Modified Mayes’s Hematoxylin HXMMHPT StatLab Medical Products","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"99o5d","text":"2. 10% Acidic Acid","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"avs7t","text":"3. Scott’s Tap Water (1L + 3.5g Sodium Bicarb + 20g Magnesium Sulfate pH 8.0) - Bluing Agent","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"a4rqp","text":"4. Eosin Y Stain STE0150 StatLab Medical Products","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1fv0n","text":"5. reagents in 250 ml Coplin Jar ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Deparaffinization and rehydration: 2 x xylene 7 min, 100% ethanol 4 min, 95% 4 min, 80% 4 min, 70% 4 min, bring to water.
Hematoxylin staining for 30 seconds - 4 min. using filtered dye (usually 2 mins) - Modified Mayes’s Hematoxylin HXMMHPT StatLab Medical Products
10% acetic acid rinse (acid into water) – 1 min
TBS (1x) rinse or Scott’s Tap Water (1L + 3.5g Sodium Bicarb + 20g Magnesium Sulfate pH 8.0) - 2 mins
Stain Eosin for 0.5 to 2 minutes (keep an eye on intensity of pink) – Eosin Y Stain STE0150 StatLab Medical Products
Rinse in 2 x 95% EtOH, 2 x 100% EtOH, xylene
Coverslip with Permount Mounting Medium EMS #17986-01
creator: Stella Breslin
